name: Physical Activity Counseling Codes
description: CPT and HCPCS codes for physical activity counseling, preventive medicine counseling related to exercise, therapeutic exercise programs, and exercise class services. Used in BMI/obesity management, weight management, and preventive health counseling quality measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 15 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 30 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 45 minutes
Preventive medicine counseling and/or risk factor reduction intervention, approximately 60 minutes
Brief face-to-face behavioral counseling for alcohol misuse, 15 minutes
Face-to-face behavioral counseling for obesity, 15 minutes
Exercise classes, non-physician provider, per session
Therapeutic procedure, 1 or more areas, each 15 minutes; therapeutic exercises to develop strength and endurance, flexibility and range of motion
Therapeutic activities, direct (one-on-one) patient contact, each 15 minutes (use of dynamic activities to improve functional performance)
Therapeutic procedure(s), group (2 or more individuals)
